prompts: Write a one-paragraph response to a friend who asks how your week is going.
Describe the way light falls in your favorite room around dusk.
Explain why you make a particular kind of coffee in the morning.
Tell me, in three sentences, why most software gets harder to maintain over time.
Compose a short note to someone you owe an apology.
Describe what it feels like to walk into a library that you know well.
Recount a small kindness someone showed you that you still remember.
